agent: 06 Push / FCM / Remote Listen / SOS / Force Ring Agent

push_static.flow: Capacitor PushNotifications -> NativeNotification plugin (Android) -> SW fallback -> Notification API. FCM registration via BackgroundLocation.getFcmToken() upserted into fcm_tokens with onConflict (user_id,fcm_token). Server uses push-notify Edge Function with VAPID (web) + FCM v1 HTTP API (Android).
push_static.idempotency: Idempotency-Key header + body.idempotency_key UUID mirror -> INSERT push_idempotency unique key. 23505 short-circuits with duplicate:true. BUT push_idempotency table has no RLS in production (Agent 02 P0 carryforward) so anon can pre-claim keys and suppress emergency pushes.
push_static.fallback: pending_notifications row inserted unconditionally (D-A04). Android LocationService polls via get_pending_notifications SECURITY DEFINER RPC. NEW P1: that RPC is GRANTED TO anon and has no internal auth - any anon can read pending pushes for any family_id.
concerns: N2 [P2] no per-user/per-IP rate limit on push-notify
N3 [P2] no body-size cap on instant title/message (only force_ring 80-char cap)
N4 [P2] String(err) / pg-error message returned on 500 paths
N5 [P2] remote_listen_sessions.duration_ms / ended_at set client-side only - client crash leaves audit row open
Edge Function validateRemoteListenEntitlement (L100-125) gates on family_subscription.status + remote_listen_enabled kill switch - PASS
AmbientListenService Android-14+ falls back from TYPE_MICROPHONE to TYPE_SPECIAL_USE then stopSelf() because OS mutes mic in SPECIAL_USE - PASS (clean failure, not silent stream)
N6 [P2] kkuk_check_cooldown RPC inspects only sos_events. If sos_events INSERT fails after dispatch, cooldown won't trigger on retry. Acceptable for emergency.
Realtime broadcast + push-notify + audit row are all fire-and-forget. Failure on one channel does not block the others - intentional emergency design.
sos_events RLS: SELECT family-scoped, INSERT requires sender_user_id = auth.uid(), no UPDATE/DELETE policies (immutable). Agent 02 verified anon 401.
force_ring_events RLS: INSERT requires parent role + initiator_user_id = auth.uid(); UPDATE limited to initiator or target; no DELETE policy.
UNIQUE PARTIAL INDEX on (family_id) WHERE stopped_at IS NULL -> one active per family.
UNIQUE INDEX on client_request_hash -> request dedup.
Quota: 1/day free, 10/day premium via force_ring_check_quota SECURITY DEFINER (REVOKE FROM anon).
data-only FCM with TTL 600s + direct_boot_ok - works while device locked.
ForceRingActivity.java L64 requestDismissKeyguard - lint NewApi P1 (Agent 01 carryforward).
ForceRingActivity.java L159 pre-Tiramisu registerReceiver missing RECEIVER_NOT_EXPORTED flag - lint P1 (Agent 01 carryforward).

runtime_evidence: NOT_VERIFIED - paired devices unavailable, anon HTTP probes blocked by Claude Code auto-mode classifier (see push-safety-evidence/probe-summary.txt)

issues.title: get_pending_notifications RPC anon-callable with no internal auth check
issues.description: 20260314000002_native_push_support.sql L44-60 + L95 GRANT EXECUTE TO anon. SECURITY DEFINER function filters only on p_family_id arg. Any anon caller with a family_id UUID can SELECT id/title/body/data jsonb/created_at of every undelivered pending notification (1-day expires_at). Surface includes child names, event titles, urgent/severity/alertType, requesterUserId. Recommend: revoke from anon OR add internal check (p_family_id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_members WHERE user_id = auth.uid())).

issues.title: push-notify has no global rate limit
issues.description: Only force_ring has quota (1/10 per day). Instant push (kkuk, parent_alert, sos, new_event, remote_listen) relies on idempotency dedup. An authenticated member could spam pushes in their family.

issues.title: push-notify has no body-size cap on title/message
issues.description: Only force_ring truncates message to 80 chars. FCM 4KB hard cap caps blast radius but oversized payload causes failed sends.

issues.title: push-notify returns raw error strings on 500 paths
issues.description: L493 String(err) and L623 insertErr.message exposed to client. Low risk (strings, not stack traces) but pg error text may leak schema hints.

issues.title: remote_listen_sessions ended_at/duration_ms set client-side only
issues.description: Client crash leaves an open audit row indefinitely; UX bug not security issue.

issues.title: kkuk_check_cooldown depends on sos_events insert success
issues.description: If audit row insert fails after dispatch, cooldown won't gate retries. Acceptable for emergency (must deliver) but worth tracking.

blocking_reasons: Agent 02 F-001/F-002 (P0) - push_idempotency + push_sent anon RLS bypass enables emergency push suppression on a children-safety product. This single P0 defeats every PASS in this agent's report.
